title: Papyrus #0460: Greek-Egyptian Court Record
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — court record document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — court record document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a court record document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
